title: Vulnerable Systems: What's at Risk in the Quantum Era
description: Identify the critical systems and infrastructure vulnerable to quantum attacks. Understand the scope of impact across industries, protocols, and applications that depend on soon-to-be-broken cryptography.
learningObjectives: Identify major systems and protocols vulnerable to quantum attacks
Understand the scope of impact across different industries
Recognize the cryptographic dependencies in common applications
Assess the criticality of various vulnerable systems
Map the attack surface exposed by quantum computers
